title: $:/plugins/wikilabs/custom-markup
author: wikilabs
name: Custom Markup
description: Vocabularies of marker tiddlers let you build your own DSL on top of wikitext. Activate per tiddler via the type field or via \importcustom.
readme:
Adds a possibilty to style text content with wikitext syntax

It's possible to manipulate the rules behaviour with: 

* `\rules only ticktext`
* `\rules excpet ticktext`
